The sample does not appear to have any network activity, but it does have a registry persistence key, indicating it may be attempting to persist on the system. There are 4 files dropped by the sample.

The sample sets a registry key to point to the dropped 'svchost.com' file, which is likely a persistence mechanism to ensure the malware runs on system startup.
